title: School of Football | Can football teach a robot to move? | Boston Dynamics x Hyundai
summary:
In School of Football, Atlas meets the world’s most beloved sport. With the FIFA World Cup 2026 ahead, can football teach a robot how to move?

Atlas’ journey into football starts now.
